---
name: Enhancement
about: Propose a focused improvement
title: "[Enhancement]: "
labels: enhancement, roadmap
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What improvement are you proposing?

## Motivation

Why is this useful for safe local-first AI workflows?

## Scope

What should be included?

## Out of Scope

What should not be included?

## Safety Considerations

Does this affect destructive operations, approvals, backups, logs, local files, external communication, or automation?

## Completion Condition

What should be true when this enhancement is complete?
